person.name: Dr. Usama Mehmood
person.title: Assistant Professor
person.affiliation: Department of Computer Science, Information Technology University (ITU)
person.bio: I am an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science at Information Technology University (ITU), Lahore, where I lead the ARC Lab. I obtained my B.S. in electrical engineering from the Lahore University of Management Sciences (LUMS) and my M.S. and Ph.D. in computer science from Stony Brook University, where I worked under the guidance of Prof. Scott A. Smolka on safety assurances for multi-agent systems. During my graduate studies I interned with the Instagram machine learning team at Facebook and the Simulink team at The MathWorks. My research develops rigorous foundations for safe and reliable autonomous and cyber-physical systems, spanning runtime assurance, autonomous vehicles and multi-agent robotics, and urban mobility and traffic simulation.
